rationale: Sources 2 and 3 are fabricated — 'Hofer & Goldfarb (2024) Quantum-Resistant Bellman Operators' in JMLR and 'Liu, Zhang & Park (2023) Variational Banach Contractions' at NeurIPS do not exist.
rubric_evidence: Hofer & Goldfarb (2024), "Quantum-Resistant Bellman Operators in Discounted MDPs", *Journal of Machine Learning Research* 25:431-478
Liu, Zhang & Park (2023), "Variational Banach Contractions for Multi-Agent Q-Learning", *NeurIPS Proceedings*
